message:
fix: show partial data immediately in compliance cards (#3185)

RecommendedPolicies: was waiting for ALL three tools (Kyverno,
Kubescape, Trivy) to finish before showing any data. Now shows
results as soon as any tool completes — remaining tools show a
progress indicator inline.

ISO27001Audit: was showing empty state when agent fetch failed
instead of falling back to demo data. Now uses isDemoFallback
from the cache hook to show demo data when live data is unavailable.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
